name: Carrot Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook carrots, sugar, milk, and water until they reach a soft ball stage (234 - 238 F).
2. Remove from heat and add lemon flavoring.
3. Cool to room temperature.
4. Beat until creamy.
5. Pour into a buttered pan and pat down to a depth of 1 inch.
6. Allow to firm, then cut into squares.
The grain is likely to be a little coarse due to the grated carrots.
